metadata.title: Who Ate the Birthday Cake?
metadata.one_liner: A slice of birthday cake went missing before the party even started!

narrative.premise: Oh no! Mom made a yummy birthday cake for Lily's party. But when she came back, a piece was gone! Someone ate it. Can you find out who did it before the party starts?
starting_knowledge: A slice of the birthday cake is missing from the kitchen.
The party starts very soon and everyone is upset.

locations.name: Kitchen
locations.description: A bright, warm room that smells like sugar and vanilla. A big round birthday cake sits on the table. One slice is missing!
clues: There are small, sticky fingerprints on the cake plate.
A little pink hair bow is lying on the floor near the table.

locations.name: Garden
locations.description: A sunny garden full of bright flowers. A pair of muddy boots sit by the back door.
clues: Mom's green gardening gloves are here with fresh soil on them.

locations.name: Living Room
locations.description: A cosy room with a big fluffy sofa. The television is showing Grandpa's favourite quiz show.
clues: Grandpa's open crossword book is sitting on the sofa cushion.

characters.appearance: A small girl with curly red hair tied with a pink bow. She has a tiny smear of white icing near her mouth.
characters.background: Poppy is Lily's little sister. She loves sweets more than anything in the whole world.
characters.personality: Bubbly and giggly, but tries to look very innocent when she is in trouble.
characters.initial_attitude_towards_investigator: Very shy. Looks at the floor and fidgets a lot.
characters.mystery_action_real: She sneaked into the kitchen and ate a slice of the birthday cake while Mom was in the garden.
characters.stated_alibi: I was playing with my dolls in my bedroom the whole time!
characters.motive: She could not wait for the party and loves cake too much to resist.
knowledge: The cake is really, really yummy.
I think I dropped my hair bow somewhere...

characters.appearance: A tall man with fluffy white hair and a warm smile. He wears a cosy blue cardigan and round glasses.
characters.background: Grandpa came early to help set up the party. He has a well-known love of cake.
characters.personality: Jolly and chatty. Loves quiz shows, crossword puzzles, and sneaking extra dessert.
characters.initial_attitude_towards_investigator: Happy to help and very talkative.
characters.mystery_action_real: He was sitting on the sofa watching his quiz show and doing his crossword puzzle.
characters.stated_alibi: I have been right here on the sofa the whole time, doing my crossword!
characters.motive: He loves cake and always tries to sneak a piece before everyone else.
knowledge: I heard little footsteps running down the hallway a little while ago.
I have been in the living room ever since I arrived.

characters.appearance: A woman with brown hair in a ponytail, wearing a yellow apron and carrying muddy green gardening gloves.
characters.background: Mom baked the birthday cake this morning and went to the garden to pick flowers for the party table.
characters.personality: Kind and organised. Very worried about the missing cake slice right now.
characters.initial_attitude_towards_investigator: Grateful and glad for your help.
characters.mystery_action_real: She was in the garden picking flowers for the party table.
characters.stated_alibi: I was in the garden the whole time. My gloves got quite muddy!
knowledge: I left the cake cooling on the table when I went outside.
I did not go back inside until just now when I found the slice missing.

ground_truth.what_happened: Poppy sneaked into the kitchen and ate a slice of the birthday cake while Mom was busy in the garden, dropping her pink hair bow on the floor.
ground_truth.why_it_happened: Poppy could not wait for the party and could not resist the delicious cake.
timeline: 10:00 AM - Mom finishes baking the cake and places it on the kitchen table to cool.
10:05 AM - Mom goes to the garden to pick flowers. Grandpa arrives and settles on the sofa.
10:15 AM - Poppy sneaks into the kitchen and eats a slice of cake. Her pink bow falls off.
10:30 AM - Mom comes back inside and discovers the missing slice.
